title: sterculia excelsa
intro: Sterculia excelsa, also known as the Tallow Tree or Candle Tree, is a large tropical tree native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like sterculic acid. The extracts of this plant have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. In traditional medicine, Sterculia excelsa is prepared as a decoction, infusion, or topical cream, and is also used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
